PREVIEW // standalone HTML — the real site is a Quarto build (see README). This file mirrors the theme and catalog so you can see it without installing anything.
COMPANION // FAccT '26

Investigating the Role of AI in Emergency Management

Use cases, challenges, and opportunities — turned into a project picker and onboarding kit for computing researchers.

32 interviewed emergency managers · 7 use-case categories · 136 specific use cases
~95% of an emergency manager's time is "blue sky" — non-activated. Yet most tools target the other 5%. Build for the 95%.

Use-Case Catalog

Filter by category, EM phase, feasibility, and current AI use — then read the open problems. (20 grounded example rows shown; the real catalog extends to 136.)

EM phase: Mitigation Preparedness Response Recovery
Use caseCategoryPhasePart.FeasibilityAI nowDatasets / methodsOpen problems
